risks: Cannot assess entry price without asking price.
due_diligence: Request confirmed asking price and sale terms.

explanations.data_quality_score: Price is missing, reducing data quality.

risks: Cannot validate price per sqm without area.
due_diligence: Request official area confirmation from title or floor plan.

explanations.data_quality_score: Area is missing, so unit economics are incomplete.

due_diligence: Calculate price per sqm after confirming price and area.

risks: Address omission increases fake or misleading listing risk.
due_diligence: Request exact address and verify building identity.

explanations.fake_score: Missing address is a strong fake-listing signal.
explanations.location_score: Location cannot be assessed reliably without address.

advantages: Coordinates are available for location verification.

explanations.liquidity_score: First floor is preferred for street retail and customer access.
explanations.investment_score: First floor supports stronger leasing and resale demand.

disadvantages: Property is not on the first floor.
risks: Higher floor may reduce tenant demand and investor liquidity.
due_diligence: Confirm actual floor and independent street access.

advantages: Building is modern, commissioned in 2020 or later.

explanations.building_score: A 2020+ building receives a strong building score uplift.
Building year meets the platform's minimum criterion.

disadvantages: Building is older than the target criterion.
risks: Older building may carry technical, capex, or liquidity risks.
due_diligence: Inspect engineering systems, facade, common areas, and capex history.
Verify lease agreement, tenant entity, rent, indexation, and break options.

explanations.tenant_score: Federal tenant materially improves tenant quality.
explanations.liquidity_score: Federal tenant improves resale liquidity for income investors.

risks: Vacancy or weak tenant risk is unresolved.
due_diligence: Confirm current occupancy and lease status.

explanations.tenant_score: Tenant score is reduced because tenant identity is unknown.

advantages: High electric power supports a wider tenant pool.

explanations.liquidity_score: 80+ kW power is attractive for retail, food, and service tenants.

risks: Low power may limit tenant categories and require capex.
due_diligence: Request utility capacity documents and technical connection terms.

explanations.liquidity_score: Power below 30 kW reduces tenant flexibility.

due_diligence: Verify cost, timeline, and technical feasibility of power increase.

explanations.liquidity_score: Power increase option improves leasing flexibility.

risks: Cannot confirm whether power is sufficient for target tenants.
due_diligence: Request confirmed allocated electric power in kW.

explanations.data_quality_score: Missing power data weakens investment confidence.

disadvantages: Repair or fit-out investment is likely required.
risks: Capex may be higher than advertised.
due_diligence: Estimate fit-out capex and timeline before offer.

explanations.investment_score: No repair or shell condition reduces near-term investment quality.

advantages: Existing repair can reduce launch capex.

explanations.investment_score: Existing repair improves readiness for use.

risks: Suspiciously low price per sqm requires verification.
due_diligence: Check ownership, encumbrances, listing authenticity, and actual sale price.

explanations.fake_score: Very low price per sqm is treated as a fake or misleading listing signal.

advantages: Price is within the target MVP range.

explanations.investment_score: Price matches the platform's target acquisition band.

disadvantages: Price is outside the target MVP range.
risks: Object may not fit the target investor mandate.

explanations.investment_score: Price outside target range reduces mandate fit.

risks: Long exposure may indicate overpricing, weak demand, or hidden defects.
due_diligence: Ask why the asset has not sold and review previous price changes.

risks: No photos makes listing quality harder to verify.
due_diligence: Request current interior, facade, entrance, and utility photos.

risks: Seller identity is weakly represented in normalized data.
due_diligence: Verify seller or agency identity before engagement.

explanations.fake_score: Weak seller identity increases misleading-listing risk.
